title: Delicate Ukrainian Sesame Dumplings
description: These tangy and fluffy dumplings are a vegetarian friendly Ukrainian dish featuring sesame seeds, and are perfect for a snack or light meal. The brine dry process gives them a unique flavor and texture.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sesame seeds, salt, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, proof the yeast by mixing it with the warm water and letting it sit for 5 minutes.
Add the yeast mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Once the dough has risen, punch it down and divide it into small pieces.
Shape each piece into a ball and then flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat and fry the dumplings until they are golden brown.
Remove the dumplings from the oil and place them in the brine for 10 minutes to give them a tangy flavor.
Serve the dumplings warm or at room temperature.
